revision.comment: /* 日本各地の四所神社 */
曖昧さ回避化
revision.text:
'''四所神社'''（ししょじんじゃ）は、[[日本]]の[[神社]]。[[四所明神]]を祀るもの他がある。 ---- ;北海道・東北地方 * [[四所神社 (つがる市)]] - [[青森県]][[つがる市]]。 * 四所神社 (大月市) - [[高岩四所神社]]。[[山形県]][[大月市]]。
;関東・甲信地方 * 四所神社 (富里市) - [[日吉倉四所神社]]。[[千葉県]][[富里市]]。 * [[四所神社 (山武市)]] - 千葉県[[山武市]]。
<!-- ;北陸・東海地方 -->
;近畿地方 * [[四所神社 (豊岡市)]] - [[兵庫県]][[豊岡市]]。 * [[四所神社 (十津川村)]] - [[奈良県]][[吉野郡]][[十津川村]]。
;中国・四国地方 * [[四所神社 (徳島市)]] - [[徳島県]][[徳島市]]。 * [[四所神社 (三好市)]] - 徳島県[[三好市]]。
<!-- ;九州・沖縄地方 -->
{{曖昧さ回避}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:ししよしんしや}} [[Category:神社]]

{{曖昧さ回避}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:ししよしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

revision.comment: 横線を除去、「;」を用いた小見出しを除去（[[H:LIST]]、[[Help‐ノート:箇条書き#定義の箇条書きと箇条書きの複合について]]）
revision.text:
'''四所神社'''（ししょじんじゃ）は、[[日本]]の[[神社]]。[[四所明神]]を祀るものほかがある。
* [[四所神社 (つがる市)]] - [[青森県]][[つがる市]]。 * 四所神社 (大月市) - [[高岩四所神社]]。[[山形県]][[大月市]]。 * 四所神社 (富里市) - [[日吉倉四所神社]]。[[千葉県]][[富里市]]。 * [[四所神社 (山武市)]] - 千葉県[[山武市]]。 * [[四所神社 (豊岡市)]] - [[兵庫県]][[豊岡市]]。 * [[四所神社 (十津川村)]] - [[奈良県]][[吉野郡]][[十津川村]]。 * [[四所神社 (徳島市)]] - [[徳島県]][[徳島市]]。 * [[四所神社 (三好市山城町)]] - 徳島県[[三好市]][[山城町大月]]。 * [[四所神社 (三好市西祖谷山村)]] - 徳島県三好市[[西祖谷山村後山]]。
{{曖昧さ回避}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:ししよしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

Located in {{ill|Ōtsuki|ja|大月市}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|..."
revision.text:
'''Shisho Shrine''' (四所神社) refers to various {{ill|Shrines|ja|神社}} in Japan that enshrine the {{ill|Shisho Myōjin|ja|四所明神}} or similar deities.
* {{ill|Shisho Shrine (Tsugaru)|ja|四所神社 (つがる市)}} - Located in {{ill|Tsugaru|ja|つがる市}}, {{ill|Aomori Prefecture|ja|青森県}}. * Shisho Shrine (Ōtsuki) - Known as {{ill|Takaiwa Shisho Shrine|ja|高岩四所神社}}. Located in {{ill|Ōtsuki|ja|大月市}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山形県}}. * Shisho Shrine (Tomisato) - Known as {{ill|Hiyoshikura Shisho Shrine|ja|日吉倉四所神社}}. Located in {{ill|Tomisato|ja|富里市}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|ja|千葉県}}. * {{ill|Shisho Shrine (Sanmu)|ja|四所神社 (山武市)}} - Located in Sanmu City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Shisho Shrine (Toyooka)|ja|四所神社 (豊岡市)}} - Located in {{ill|Toyooka|ja|豊岡市}}, {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|ja|兵庫県}}. * {{ill|Shisho Shrine (Totsukawa)|ja|四所神社 (十津川村)}} - Located in {{ill|Totsukawa|ja|十津川村}}, {{ill|Yoshino District|ja|吉野郡}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}. * {{ill|Shisho Shrine (Tokushima)|ja|四所神社 (徳島市)}} - Located in {{ill|Tokushima|ja|徳島市}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県}}. * {{ill|Shisho Shrine (Miyoshi, Yamashiro Town)|ja|四所神社 (三好市山城町)}} - Located in {{ill|Yamashiro Town|ja|山城町大月}}, {{ill|Miyoshi|ja|三好市}}, Tokushima Prefecture. * {{ill|Shisho Shrine (Miyoshi, Nishi Iya)|ja|四所神社 (三好市西祖谷山村)}} - Located in {{ill|Nishi Iya|ja|西祖谷山村後山}}, Miyoshi City, Tokushima Prefecture.
{{Disambiguation}}
[[Category:Shrines with identical names]] [[ja:四所神社]]

'''Shisho Shrine''' (四所神社) refers to various {{ill|Shrines|ja|神社}} in Japan that enshrine the {{ill|Shisho Myōjin|ja|四所明神}} or similar deities.

Located in {{ill|Tomisato|ja|富里市}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|ja|千葉県}}. * {{ill|Shisho Shrine (Sanmu)|ja|四所神社 (山武市)}} - Located in Sanmu City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Shisho Shrine (Toyooka)|ja|四所神社 (豊岡市)}} - Located in {{ill|Toyooka|ja|豊岡市}}, {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|ja|兵庫県}}. * {{ill|Shisho Shrine (Totsukawa)|ja|四所神社 (十津川村)}} - Located in {{ill|Totsukawa|ja|十津川村}}, {{ill|Yoshino District|ja|吉野郡}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}. * {{ill|Shisho Shrine (Tokushima)|ja|四所神社 (徳島市)}} - Located in {{ill|Tokushima|ja|徳島市}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県}}. * {{ill|Shisho Shrine (Miyoshi, Yamashiro Town)|ja|四所神社 (三好市山城町)}} - Located in {{ill|Yamashiro Town|ja|山城町大月}}, {{ill|Miyoshi|ja|三好市}}, Tokushima Prefecture. * {{ill|Shisho Shrine (Miyoshi, Nishi Iya)|ja|四所神社 (三好市西祖谷山村)}} - Located in {{ill|Nishi Iya|ja|西祖谷山村後山}}, Miyoshi City, Tokushima Prefecture.

revision.text:
'''Shisho Shrine''' (四所神社) refers to various {{ill|Shrines|ja|神社}} in Japan that enshrine the {{ill|Shisho Myōjin|ja|四所明神}} or similar deities.
* {{ill|Shisho Shrine (Tsugaru)|ja|四所神社 (つがる市)}} - Located in {{ill|Tsugaru|ja|つがる市}}, {{ill|Aomori Prefecture|ja|青森県}}. * Shisho Shrine (Ōtsuki) - Known as {{ill|Takaiwa Shisho Shrine|ja|高岩四所神社}}. Located in {{ill|Ōtsuki|ja|大月市}}, {{ill|Yamanashi Prefecture|ja|山形県}}. * Shisho Shrine (Tomisato) - Known as {{ill|Hiyoshikura Shisho Shrine|ja|日吉倉四所神社}}. Located in {{ill|Tomisato|ja|富里市}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|ja|千葉県}}. * {{ill|Shisho Shrine (Sanmu)|ja|四所神社 (山武市)}} - Located in Sanmu City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Shisho Shrine (Toyooka)|ja|四所神社 (豊岡市)}} - Located in {{ill|Toyooka|ja|豊岡市}}, {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|ja|兵庫県}}. * {{ill|Shisho Shrine (Totsukawa)|ja|四所神社 (十津川村)}} - Located in {{ill|Totsukawa|ja|十津川村}}, {{ill|Yoshino District|ja|吉野郡}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}. * {{ill|Shisho Shrine (Tokushima)|ja|四所神社 (徳島市)}} - Located in {{ill|Tokushima|ja|徳島市}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|ja|徳島県}}. * {{ill|Shisho Shrine (Miyoshi, Yamashiro Town)|ja|四所神社 (三好市山城町)}} - Located in {{ill|Yamashiro Town|ja|山城町大月}}, {{ill|Miyoshi|ja|三好市}}, Tokushima Prefecture. * {{ill|Shisho Shrine (Miyoshi, Nishi Iya)|ja|四所神社 (三好市西祖谷山村)}} - Located in {{ill|Nishi Iya|ja|西祖谷山村後山}}, Miyoshi City, Tokushima Prefecture.
{{Disambiguation}}

revision.text:
'''四所神社'''（ししょじんじゃ）は、[[日本]]の[[神社]]。[[四所明神]]を祀るものほかがある。
* [[四所神社 (つがる市)]] - [[青森県]][[つがる市]]。 * 四所神社 (大月市) - [[高岩四所神社]]。[[山形県]][[大月市]]。 * 四所神社 (富里市) - [[日吉倉四所神社]]。[[千葉県]][[富里市]]。 * [[四所神社 (山武市)]] - 千葉県[[山武市]]。 * [[四所神社 (豊岡市)]] - [[兵庫県]][[豊岡市]]。 * [[四所神社 (十津川村)]] - [[奈良県]][[吉野郡]][[十津川村]]。 * [[四所神社 (徳島市)]] - [[徳島県]][[徳島市]]。 * [[四所神社 (三好市山城町)]] - 徳島県[[三好市]][[山城町大月]]。 * [[四所神社 (三好市西祖谷山村)]] - 徳島県三好市[[西祖谷山村後山]]。
{{曖昧さ回避}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:ししよしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

'''Shisho Shrine''' (四所神社) refers to various {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shrines}} in Japan that enshrine the {{ill|Shisho Myōjin|ja|四所明神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shisho Myōjin|1=Shisho Myōjin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q10925005}} or similar deities.
* {{ill|Shisho Shrine (Tsugaru)|ja|四所神社 (つがる市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shisho Shrine (Tsugaru)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in {{ill|Tsugaru, Aomori|en|Tsugaru, Aomori|WD=Q372517|lt=Tsugaru}}, {{ill|Aomori Prefecture|en|Aomori Prefecture|WD=Q71699|lt=Aomori Prefecture}}. * Shisho Shrine (Ōtsuki) - Known as {{ill|Takaiwa Shisho Shrine|ja|高岩四所神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takaiwa Shisho Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Located in {{ill|Ōtsuki, Yamanashi|en|Ōtsuki, Yamanashi|WD=Q386508|lt=Ōtsuki}}, {{ill|Yamagata Prefecture|en|Yamagata Prefecture|WD=Q125863|lt=Yamanashi Prefecture}}. * Shisho Shrine (Tomisato) - Known as {{ill|Hiyoshikura Shisho Shrine|ja|日吉倉四所神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiyoshikura Shisho Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Located in {{ill|Tomisato|en|Tomisato|WD=Q692857|lt=Tomisato}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|en|Chiba Prefecture|WD=Q80011|lt=Chiba Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Shisho Shrine (Sanmu)|ja|四所神社 (山武市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shisho Shrine (Sanmu)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in Sanmu City, Chiba Prefecture. * {{ill|Shisho Shrine (Toyooka)|ja|四所神社 (豊岡市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shisho Shrine (Toyooka)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Toyooka, Hyōgo|en|Toyooka, Hyōgo|WD=Q696388|lt=Toyooka}}, {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|en|Hyōgo Prefecture|WD=Q130290|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Shisho Shrine (Totsukawa)|ja|四所神社 (十津川村)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shisho Shrine (Totsukawa)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in {{ill|Totsukawa|en|Totsukawa|WD=Q1202740|lt=Totsukawa}}, {{ill|Yoshino District, Nara|en|Yoshino District, Nara|WD=Q1154558|lt=Yoshino District}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|en|Nara Prefecture|WD=Q131287|lt=Nara Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Shisho Shrine (Tokushima)|ja|四所神社 (徳島市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shisho Shrine (Tokushima)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Tokushima (city)|en|Tokushima (city)|WD=Q207309|lt=Tokushima}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|en|Tokushima Prefecture|WD=Q160734|lt=Tokushima Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Shisho Shrine (Miyoshi, Yamashiro Town)|ja|四所神社 (三好市山城町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shisho Shrine (Miyoshi, Yamashiro Town)|qq=}} - Located in {{ill|Yamashiro Town|ja|山城町大月|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamashiro Town|qq=}}, {{ill|Miyoshi, Tokushima|en|Miyoshi, Tokushima|WD=Q990371|lt=Miyoshi}}, Tokushima Prefecture. * {{ill|Shisho Shrine (Miyoshi, Nishi Iya)|ja|四所神社 (三好市西祖谷山村)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shisho Shrine (Miyoshi, Nishi Iya)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} - Located in {{ill|Nishi Iya|ja|西祖谷山村後山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nishi Iya|1=Nishi Iya|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q128850490}}, Miyoshi City, Tokushima Prefecture.
